properties.query:
let queryperiod = 1d;
let mode = dynamic(['Blocked', 'Detected']);
let successCode = dynamic(['200', '101', '204', '400', '504', '304', '401', '500']);
let sessionBin = 30m;
AzureDiagnostics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(queryperiod)
| where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.NETWORK'
    and Category =~ 'ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog'
    and Action_s in (mode)
| sort by originalHost_s asc, clientIP_s asc, TimeGenerated asc
| extend SessionBlockedStarted = row_window_session(TimeGenerated, queryperiod, 10m, ((clientIP_s != prev(clientIP_s)) or (originalHost_s != prev(originalHost_s))))
| summarize SessionBlockedEnded = max(TimeGenerated), SessionBlockedCount = count() by originalHost_s, clientIP_s, SessionBlockedStarted
| extend TimeKey = range(bin(SessionBlockedStarted, sessionBin), bin(SessionBlockedEnded, sessionBin), sessionBin)
| mv-expand TimeKey to typeof(datetime)
| join kind = inner(
    AzureDiagnostics
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(queryperiod)
    | where Category =~ 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog' and (isempty(httpStatus_d) or httpStatus_d in (successCode))
    | extend TimeKey = bin(TimeGenerated, sessionBin)
    | extend
        hostname_s = coalesce(originalHost_s, host_s),
        clientIp_s = coalesce(clientIP_s, clientIP_s)
    )
    on TimeKey, originalHost_s, clientIP_s
| where TimeGenerated between (SessionBlockedStarted .. SessionBlockedEnded)
| extend
    originalRequestUriWithArgs_s = column_ifexists("originalRequestUriWithArgs_s", ""),
    serverStatus_s = column_ifexists("serverStatus_s", "")
| summarize
    SuccessfulAccessCount = count(),
    UserAgents = make_set(userAgent_s, 250),
    RequestURIs = make_set(requestUri_s, 250),
    OriginalRequestURIs = make_set(originalRequestUriWithArgs_s, 250),
    SuccessCodes = make_set(httpStatus_d, 250),
    SuccessCodes_BackendServer = make_set(serverStatus_s, 250),
    take_any(SessionBlockedEnded, SessionBlockedCount)
    by hostname_s, clientIp_s, SessionBlockedStarted
| where SessionBlockedCount > SuccessfulAccessCount
| extend BlockvsSuccessRatio = SessionBlockedCount / toreal(SuccessfulAccessCount)
| sort by BlockvsSuccessRatio desc, SessionBlockedStarted asc
| project-reorder
    SessionBlockedStarted,
    SessionBlockedEnded,
    hostname_s,
    clientIp_s,
    SessionBlockedCount,
    SuccessfulAccessCount,
    BlockvsSuccessRatio,
    SuccessCodes,
    RequestURIs,
    OriginalRequestURIs,
    UserAgents
properties.description:
Detecta actividad no obstruida del cortafuegos de aplicaciones web (WAF) en sesiones en las que el WAF bloqueó solicitudes entrantes calculando la proporción entre solicitudes bloqueadas y solicitudes WAF no obstruidas en estas sesiones (métrica BlockvsSuccessRatio).
   Un valor de ratio alto para una IP de cliente y nombre de host dados requiere una investigación más profunda de los datos del WAF en esa sesión, debido al número significativamente alto de peticiones bloqueadas y unos pocos registros no obstruidos que pueden ser maliciosos pero que han pasado sin ser detectados por el WAF. 
La variable successCode define lo que la detección piensa que es un código de estado exitoso y debe ser alterado para ajustarse al entorno
properties.displayName: EXP0021 - Ejecucion de una solicitud web potencialmente maliciosa contra un servidor web
